meaning: n.全神贯注,兴高采烈,欢天喜地vt.使狂喜
examples: The children gazed at her in rapture.
Charles listened with rapture to her singing.
His speech was received with rapture by his supporters.
And who knows, maybe this will be the post that sends me back into the rapture.
It seems that the world of Columbia is more densely populated than the ravaged Rapture.
